title: orchis provincialis subsp. pauciflora
intro: Orchis provincialis subsp. pauciflora, also known as the Alpine Orchid, is a plant species belonging to the Orchidaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions due to its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The Alpine Orchid is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving cough and sore throat, and promoting digestion. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a decoction, tincture, or powder for oral consumption, although the specific herbal preparations and dosages may vary depending on the region and intended use.
